description: Implementation-audit findings ledger (Prompt 585A). Append findings from audit prompts 586+. See docs/operations/industry-audit-remediation-ledger.md and docs/schemas/industry-audit-finding-schema.md.

findings.summary: No material defects found. Prompt 586 (implementation-audit service map) completed; service map created; domain reviewed.
No material defects found. Bootstrap and container wiring audited; single registration, lazy loading, dependency order verified. See docs/qa/industry-bootstrap-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Registry load, validation, composition audited; safe failure and precedence verified. See docs/qa/industry-registry-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Industry Profile persistence, validation, resolution, export/restore audited; state handling consistent. See docs/qa/industry-profile-audit-report.md.

No material defects found. Onboarding/settings save flows audited; nonce, capability, validation verified. Conversion goal fields not on Profile form (documented). See docs/qa/industry-admin-save-flow-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Section recommendation scoring, fallback, explanation, full-library audited. See docs/qa/industry-section-recommendation-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Page template recommendation scoring, fallback, explanation, full-library audited. See docs/qa/industry-page-template-recommendation-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Starter bundle resolution and overlay precedence audited; deterministic, bounded. See docs/qa/industry-starter-bundle-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Helper-doc and page one-pager composition audited; layer order, fragments, allowed regions verified. See docs/qa/industry-doc-composition-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Preview/detail resolvers audited; composed state, fallback, read-only verified. See docs/qa/industry-preview-detail-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Build Plan scoring and explanation audited; contextual inputs, rationale, approval-gating verified. See docs/qa/industry-build-plan-scoring-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Build Plan conversion and execution boundary audited; draft-only, approval gates verified. See docs/qa/industry-build-plan-execution-boundary-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. What-if simulation audited; read-only, isolated, comparison parity verified. See docs/qa/industry-what-if-simulation-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. AI planner and prompt-pack overlay audited; validation, recommendation-only boundary verified. See docs/qa/industry-ai-planner-audit-report.md.
No material defects found. Styling subsystem audited; sanitization, emission, preview parity verified. See docs/qa/industry-styling-subsystem-audit-report.md.
